title: Skibidi Crystal PvP
description: Skibidi toilet themed texture pack for crystal pvp
body:
# Skibidi Toilet Texture Pack
Adds models and textures such as:
- 3D skibidi totem
- Titan TV man Energy Blade
- Titan cameraman hammer
- Energy shield
- plunger model (replaces the axe)
- TV man armour
- Big Mac golden apple
## Minor tweaks to:
- Pearl texture
- Anchor texture
